name: Emilie's Lemony Chicken Crepes
recipeIngredient: 1 package Chinese lemon chicken sauce mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chicken with a tablespoon of Lemon oil and cook quickly in oil until seared.
2. Add Lemon pepper and cook for another minute.
3. Add 1 cup dry white wine and simmer until the chicken is cooked through. Remove the chicken from the pan and chop it.
4. Add chopped onion and minced garlic to the pan and simmer until the onion is translucent, adding more wine if needed.
5. Combine the onion mixture with the chopped chicken.
6. Stir in the Cream of chicken soup and 1 can of plain yogurt.
7. Heat gently and add the sauce: Mix one can of Cream of mushroom soup with the Chinese lemon chicken sauce mix. Add 1/2 cup of water and seasonings to taste.
8. Fill crepes with the chicken mixture and pour the sauce over the top.
9. Bake at 350°F for about 15-20 minutes, or until the sauce bubbles.
